batch: Batch125 - P0 Runtime Closure & P1 Transition Gate
purpose: Only allow P1 source work after local runtime/build/auth smoke evidence is clean; public P1 rollout still requires hosted URL smoke.
p1SourceWorkAllowedWhen: hosted URL smoke is either passed or explicitly open/skipped with no fake URL
publicP1RolloutAllowedWhen: strict hosted URL smoke passes using APP_URL/NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL
mobile responsive smoke is manually confirmed on real devices or captured evidence is attached
neverAddInThisGate: verified academic status without review evidence
